name: computer-use-bridge
description: Control desktop apps on macOS through Codex Computer Use, exposed over HTTP and MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Control Mac apps via Codex Computer Use
interface.longDescription: A thin local bridge that reaches Codex Computer Use the supported way (codex app-server -> mcpServer/tool/call), exposing list_apps / get_app_state / click / type_text / scroll / drag / press_key / set_value over both an HTTP API and a stdio MCP server. Tool execution requires the launching process to hold macOS Accessibility, Input Monitoring, Screen Recording, and Automation permissions.
